nonBlockingIssues.description: ModuleList.js still has 3 inline SVGs for video, lab, and flashcard icons in module card info items (exact duplicates of Icons.jsx exports)
React import in Icons.jsx is unnecessary with new JSX transform, but consistent with existing project conventions

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When counting duplicated code patterns in feature descriptions, workers should verify counts by actually grepping for the pattern rather than relying on manual counts. The icons feature description said '12 inline SVGs' and 'ModuleList.js (2)' but ModuleList.js actually had 5 inline SVGs, 3 of which were exact duplicates left in scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-icon-components review: ModuleList.js lines 170-225 still contain 3 inline SVGs matching Icons.jsx exports that were not in scope per the feature description's count of '2'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature completes, the reviewer or orchestrator should check for remaining instances of the same pattern outside the stated scope and consider whether they warrant a follow-up feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-icon-components review found 3 additional duplicate SVGs in ModuleList.js info items and 3 in App.js sidebar nav that were correctly out of scope but represent additional DRY violations.

rejectedObservations.observation: Icons.jsx has unnecessary React import for React >= 17 with new JSX transform
rejectedObservations.reason: Consistent with existing project conventions — all components in the codebase import React explicitly. Changing this would be a project-wide decision, not specific to this feature.
